SECTION: Description

CARD: MLS Description
Welcome home to 555 Market St., where comfort, warmth, and effortless entertaining meet in one of the area's most delightful neighborhoods. Spanning an impressive 3,543 square feet, this light-filled sanctuary offers 4 generous bedrooms and 3 full bathrooms, meticulously designed to accommodate every stage of life.

From the moment you step through the front door, you will notice beautiful, high-end upgrades throughout the entire home. The clever floor plan features a versatile main-level layout, including a main-floor bedroom and a dedicated home office paired with a full bathroom—ideal for multigenerational living, hosting overnight guests, or working from home in absolute quiet.

The heart of the home seamlessly connects inviting living areas to an outdoor paradise built for making memories. Step outside into your private backyard oasis, complete with a sparkling in-ground pool and a full built-in BBQ sitting area. Whether you are hosting summer weekend pool parties, grilling dinner with loved ones, or enjoying a quiet evening under the stars, this yard is destined to be your favorite place to unwind.

Location is everything, and this home places you just moments away from the best local shopping, dining, and community gathering spots. Beautifully maintained and turnkey, 555 Market St. is ready to welcome its next owners. Offered at $1,000,000.

For private tours or more details, reach out to Kari Cross with Corcoran Icon Properties at 925-584-1640 or kcross@crossgrouphomes.com.

Welcome to 555 Market St.! This beautiful 3,543 sq. ft. home features 4 bedrooms, an office, a main-level bedroom and bath, plus an incredible backyard with an in-ground pool and outdoor BBQ built for entertaining. Offered at $1,000,000—close to top shopping and dining!

SECTION: Blog

CARD: Blog Title & Article

### Title: Welcome to 555 Market St.: The Ultimate Entertainer’s Haven in Brentwood

Finding a home that strikes the perfect balance between daily functionality and weekend enjoyment can be a challenge—but 555 Market St. delivers effortlessly on both fronts.

Offered at $1,000,000, this stunning 4-bedroom, 3-bathroom residence boasts 3,543 square feet of beautifully upgraded living space. From the moment you step inside, the home feels welcoming, warm, and bright.

#### Thoughtful Design for Modern Living

One of the standout features of this home is its flexible floor plan. The main level includes a dedicated home office alongside a full bedroom and bathroom. Whether you host long-term guests, need a quiet setup for working from home, or desire a private space for extended family, this layout provides maximum versatility without sacrificing style.

#### A Backyard Built for Making Memories

While the interior upgrades are sure to impress, the backyard is where you’ll want to spend all your free time. Designed as a true outdoor retreat, the yard features:

* A sparkling **in-ground pool** perfect for cooling off on warm California afternoons.
* A full **built-in BBQ sitting area** ready for family cookouts, game days, and evening relaxation.

#### Prime Location & Lifestyle

Location is paramount, and 555 Market St. places you right in the heart of convenience. Enjoy quick access to excellent local shopping, delicious dining options, and community parks.

#### Tour 555 Market St.

Ready to experience this property in person? Mark your calendar for our upcoming Open House on **Sept 5, 2026, from 1:00 PM to 4:00 PM**.

For questions or to schedule a private showing, reach out to **Kari Cross** with Corcoran Icon Properties at **925-584-1640** or via email at **kcross@crossgrouphomes.com**.
